base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of fire_man — a character (boss) from 1987 mega man. Fire Man — head-torch boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Fire Man — head-torch boss; fires Fire Storm twin-flame
